narrative:
Tate Township F (precinct in Clermont County) has 890 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.4 percentage points.
